description: American white separatist organization founded in 1994 by Randal Lee Krager and Richard Arden while incarcerated in Oregon. The group aimed to create an all-white homeland in the Pacific Northwest and had chapters in the US and several other countries. It was considered a neo-Nazi skinhead group by watchdogs. The US branch dissolved in 2012.
